feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: API Provider With Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello,

At the time of creating API Provider with Cloud Integration when Save and clicking on test connection then it is showing an error. How to resolve the below issue.

entry.title: API Proxy 401 Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hello,

After successfully creating API Proxy with API Provider (On-Prem) at the time of test API Proxy, it shows 401 Unauthorised. Please suggest how to resolve it, and I also want to know what my basic authentication username and password will be. It should be on-prem username & password or what?.

entry.title: SAP PI Most messages are going into scheduled and few are processing success
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a schenario SOAP to SOAP.

Most of the messages are in scheduled mode and only few are processing successfully.

Even unable to get log in message log for scheduled messages.

The messages which are in scheduled mode they are not going into error and success after few hours also still they are in scheduled mode only.

around 35k messages are in schedule mode they are not going to error and not going to process and unable to see the message log and nothing is there to see after few hours from 35k few are processed and few got failed so finally 25 k messages are in scheduled and they are stuck.

Please suggest.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Dileep

entry.title: LSMW dosn't work for FIBPU(intermediary bank) for vendor with more than one bank key
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm on S4HANA Release 1809, I need to add intermediary bank for 200 vendors, and I'm using tcode FIBPU.

Whene recording the lsmw, these are the steps (see attached steps and error message) :

Step 1 : I enter the vendor number and execute.

Step 2 : The system display the different bank keys available for the entered vendor, I should select the concerned bank key : I set a filter on the bank key and double click on the good bank key.
Step 3 : I enter my sender bank criteria. 

The issue is that when executing the LSMW in foreground, it seems that it's not able to set the filter and remember correctly the selected value in the next screen : 

Error message : Error message 00344 : No batch input data for dypro SAP MSSY0 0120

Any idea on how to solve this please ? thank you!

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: I want to know the detailed step of how to direct live connect sac to sap universe?
entry.content: I have read all the related help and wiki pages, but nothing seems to work for me. I would like to know in detail how to connect SAC with SAP Universe using a direct live connection.

entry.title: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content: How long it will take for moderators to approve the blog. My blog is in Awaiting Review for more than a week

entry.title: Can we use BTP Application URL as an API.
entry.content:
Hi, After deploying project in BTP CAPM.
We got one Application URL that URL, I want to use as an API.
Is it possible, If it is. Then please provide some Idea and Blog.

entry.title: CDS view required for Material Classification characteristics in Public Cloud environment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working in a public cloud environment and I need a standard CDS View to get the material classification characteristics.

I have found the CDS View for Material Class and Characteristics separately. But I don't have the link between them. Request you to kindly help with your expertise.

CDS View for Material Class - I_ClfnClassForKeyDate

CDS View for Material characteristics - I_ClfnCharacteristic.

I need the CDS view link for Material, Class, Characteristics, and characteristic names. Below is the sample screenshot of what I need.

Thank you in advance. Your inputs are highly appreciated.

entry.title: Mass Upload of Generic Materials, BOM, and Routing in SAP Fashion Vertical (FVB)
entry.content:
Hi, I am new to SAP Fashion Vertical Business (FVB) and looking for a solution to create Generic Materials in mass using any uploader (Transaction Code: MM41). Additionally, I need to create BOM and Routing for these materials. However, I haven't found any solution specifically for mass uploads in the Fashion Vertical module.

If anyone has experience or proper data related to Fashion Vertical, please share the process or related data  Your help would be highly appreciated.

Thank you! 

SAP Fashion Management

entry.title: PM notification and order
entry.content:
Hello, I have an issue related to PM. When I fill in a field on the IW21 screen, how can I ensure that this data automatically appears when I convert it to a work order in IW32? For example, if I enter something in the Items or Tasks (in IW21), I want these fields to automatically show up in the IW32 screen when the order is converted. Is there a standard solution or a way to achieve this using BADI or something? 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: EAM 9-phase maintenance process - configuration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to configure the 9-phase maintenance process as described in the sap best practices, but can't really activate the full best-practice content on our system (we partially already use the document types, etc.). I've gotten to a point where the overall status profiles mentioned in various documentations PMSP1 and PMSP2 are needed to proceed, but can't find a single source which would list the full settings behind those status profiles as well as the sub-phases.

Could someone please provide the standard settings for those objects in a simple table form or direct me to a resource where they might already be available?

Thank you in advance!
Best regards,
Janusz Gren

entry.title: How to copy "Create On" and "Time" data on VA03
entry.content:
Kindly help me on how to copy the CREATE ON date and time from the T-code VA03 tab Sales.

My Script is not working properly:

Session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
Session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").Text = "/NVA03"
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtVBAK-VBELN").Text = "2201319443"
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtVBAK-VBELN").caretPosition = 10
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
Session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 26
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01").Select
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_HEADER:SAPMV45A:4012/txtVBAK-BSTNK").SetFocus
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_HEADER:SAPMV45A:4012/txtVBAK-BSTNK").caretPosition = 10

Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").caretPosition = 10
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").selectColumn "ERDAT"
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").contextMenu
Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAXI_TABSTRIP_HEAD/tabpT\01/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPMV45A:4301/ctxtVBAK-ERDAT").selectContextMenuItemByPosition "0"

ThisWorkbook.Sheets("Sheet1").Range("K10").PasteSpecial SkipBlanks:=True

entry.title: Can we add both Data structure and table to Sq01 Query?
entry.content:
I would like to add one structure and one table to the same query using Sq01.

These structure doesn`t have any table. So what should I do? Should I create the tables first and then add the queries or is there any other way?

entry.title: Is it possible to perform GR for Purchase order automatically (mouvement 101) in sap public cloud ?
entry.content: Is it possible to perform GR for Purchase order automatically (mouvement 101) in sap public cloud ?

entry.title: Supplier Batch CDS Views for S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Currently I'm looking for Supplier Batch field to use in my customized PO Forms, had search around few days, still not able to view the Released CDS Views to have this field.

In ME23N - the filed name is LICHA

Already search in below CDS View

I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01,

I_BATCH,

I_PurchasingDocumentItem

 

Thanks

 


Any suggestions and help will be appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Community issues when posting new blogs
entry.content:
Dear Community colleagues,

I encountered the following issues when posting blogs in https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/bg-p/erp-blog-sap

  • SAP Managed Tags can't be saved and need enter again in case you need to re-edit a blog;
  • Loading performance is too bad when create or re-edit a blog which is not user-friendly for blogger;
  • Part of blog content can't be saved , example: if hyperlink is the start of the line of a blog, it will remove it and not to be saved which could be a bug;

Can anyone double check these issues?

Thanks in advance!

Br Bob

entry.title: High CPU Utilization and latency in calls after changing the app to new Hana cloud DB
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

recently , we changed the SAP Hana Cloud for one of the CAP Service

we created new HDI Container and and Schema and unbinded the old HDI Container and binded for new HDI and Schema and Restarted the app and deployed the new Hana DB Artifacts to HDI

We are Experiencing High CPU Utilization , any suggestions and steps to be done for bringing CPU Utilization , its going around 80% some times leading to high latency in calls 

In our Solution we are replication tables from ECC System in HANA CLOUD and exposing them as capm service , CPU Utilization is more than 40% expected

entry.title: Issue with Passing FREE SELECTIONS in SUBMIT Without VIA SELECTION-SCREEN
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on an SAP ABAP program where I need to pass dynamic profit center values (PRCTR) to a report using FREE SELECTIONS. Below is a snippet of my code:

LOOP AT s_values INTO lv_prctr_value.
trange_line-tablename = 'FAGLFREESEL'.
trange_frange_t_line-fieldname = 'PRCTR'.
trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line-sign = 'I'.
trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line-option = 'EQ'.
trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line-low = lv_prctr_value.
IF lv_prctr_value IS NOT INITIAL.
APPEND trange_frange_t_selopt_t_line TO trange_frange_t_line-selopt_t.
ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

APPEND trange_frange_t_line TO trange_line-frange_t.
APPEND trange_line TO trange.

CALL FUNCTION 'FREE_SELECTIONS_RANGE_2_EX'
EXPORTING
field_ranges = trange
IMPORTING
expressions = texpr.

SUBMIT ZTEST017 "VIA SELECTION-SCREEN 
WITH SELECTION-TABLE rspar_tab
WITH B-MONATE BETWEEN lv_num AND lv_bilabmon
WITH B-MONATE IN range_tab
WITH V-MONATE BETWEEN lv_num AND lv_bilabmon
WITH V-MONATE IN range_tab
WITH FREE SELECTIONS texpr
  EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
  AND RETURN.




The Problem:

When I execute the program with the VIA SELECTION-SCREEN option in the SUBMIT command, my custom profit center (PRCTR) values are passed correctly, and I get the desired report output. However, when I execute the program without VIA SELECTION-SCREEN, the report generates output for all profit centers instead of just my custom values.

What I’ve Tried:

  • Verified that teexpr contains the correct values for the FREE SELECTIONS.
  • Used VIA SELECTION-SCREEN, which works but requires manual user interaction.
  • Attempted to directly pass the profit center values without the selection screen, but they are ignored.

My Requirement:

I need the report to honor the custom FREE SELECTIONS for the profit center (PRCTR) even when the program is run without the VIA SELECTION-SCREEN option.

Question:

How can I ensure that my custom FREE SELECTIONS for PRCTR are correctly passed to the report in the SUBMIT command when running the program without VIA SELECTION-SCREEN?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to create multiple smartform pages based on internal table entries ?
entry.content:
suppose I have 5 entries in final internal table 
so i want to create 5 pages other than first page that shows the details of 5 entries 1 for each page 

for eg i am fetching data from mara 
and there are 5 material numbers 
then first page will be table displayed in smartform 
and next 5 pages will be detailed specification of each material number !

the generation of pages changes according to internal table entries !

is it possible in smartform sap abap ?

entry.title: 32-bit CR.NET support question
entry.content:
We are currently using the 32-bit CR .NET Runtime in our application. According to this SAP documentation,  https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088411.html, the 32-bit CR .NET Runtime will be discontinued after December 2025. Could you clarify what "discontinued" means in this context? Will it still be available for use? Additionally, how will this affect   our application that have already been shipped to customers earlier and are still in use?

From the same page, it appears that the overall end of support for Crystal Reports is 2027. Do you have any recommendations for a migration path once Crystal Reports reaches its end of life?
